info.name: Pioneer DDJ-REV1
info.author: AKOI, Alexandr, LauraRozier, Mjlyon, 0b1-twan
info.description: AKOI v2.4 mapping for the Pioneer DDJ-REV1

option.label: Deck 1 Startup Mode
option.description: Choose Deck 1 startup jog mode. Vinyl enables top-plate scratching; CDJ uses bend behavior.

option.label: Deck 2 Startup Mode
option.description: Choose Deck 2 startup jog mode. Vinyl enables top-plate scratching; CDJ uses bend behavior.

option.label: Deck 3 Startup Mode
option.description: Choose Deck 3 startup jog mode. Vinyl enables top-plate scratching; CDJ uses bend behavior.

option.label: Deck 4 Startup Mode
option.description: Choose Deck 4 startup jog mode. Vinyl enables top-plate scratching; CDJ uses bend behavior.

option.label: Auto Slip (:hwbtn:`VINYL` mode only)
option.description: If enabled, jog touch in Vinyl mode auto-enables slip and jog release auto-disables slip. Disabled by default.

option.label: Scratch Feel 📀
option.description: Adjust non-shift Vinyl scratch sensitivity for top platter touch only. RPM ordered low to high.

option.label: Deck 1 Sort (:hwbtn:`SHIFT` + :hwbtn:`LOAD`)
option.description: Choose which library field Deck 1 sorts by when pressing SHIFT+LOAD.

option.label: Deck 2 Sort (:hwbtn:`SHIFT` + :hwbtn:`LOAD`)
option.description: Choose which library field Deck 2 sorts by when pressing SHIFT+LOAD.

option.label: Deck 3 Sort (:hwbtn:`SHIFT` + :hwbtn:`LOAD`)
option.description: Choose which library field Deck 3 sorts by when pressing SHIFT+LOAD.

option.label: Deck 4 Sort (:hwbtn:`SHIFT` + :hwbtn:`LOAD`)
option.description: Choose which library field Deck 4 sorts by when pressing SHIFT+LOAD.

option.label: Big Library :hwbtn:`SHIFT` + :hwbtn:`Rotary Selector Push` → Maximize📖/Minimize📘
option.description: When enabled, hold :hwbtn:`SHIFT` and press the rotary Browse encoder to toggle `[Master], maximize_library`. Normal push still moves focus forward.

option.label: :hwbtn:`First Pad` (Back)◀️
option.description: Per-pad Beat Jump: default keeps stock mapping; otherwise choose `action:size`, legacy numeric size, or full action replacement.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Second Pad` (Size - / Half)➖
option.description: Overrides Pad 2 (stock: halve beatjump size). Hold-type actions remain hold-type.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Third Pad` (Size + / Double)➕
option.description: Overrides Pad 3 (stock: double beatjump size).

option.label: :hwbtn:`Fourth Pad` (Forward)▶️
option.description: Overrides Pad 4 (stock: forward jump).

option.label: :hwbtn:`Fifth Pad` (Prev track)⏮️
option.description: Overrides Pad 5 (stock: previous track).

option.label: :hwbtn:`Sixth Pad` (Hold ⏪)
option.description: Overrides Pad 6 (stock: hold rewind).

option.label: :hwbtn:`Seventh Pad` (Hold ⏩)
option.description: Overrides Pad 7 (stock: hold fast-forward).

option.label: :hwbtn:`Eighth Pad` (Censor)🤬
option.description: Overrides Pad 8 (stock: censor / reverseroll).

option.label: :hwbtn:`First Pad`
option.description: Configures autoloop size for this pad (uses `beatloop_activate`).

option.label: :hwbtn:`Second Pad`
option.description: Configures autoloop size for this pad.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Third Pad`
option.description: Configures autoloop size for this pad.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Fourth Pad`
option.description: Configures autoloop size for this pad.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Fifth Pad`
option.description: Configures autoloop size for this pad.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Sixth Pad`
option.description: Configures autoloop size for this pad.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Seventh Pad`
option.description: Configures autoloop size for this pad.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Eighth Pad`
option.description: Configures autoloop size for this pad.

option.label: :hwbtn:`First Pad`
option.description: First Pad. The top left pad button.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Second Pad`
option.description: Second Pad.The top left second pad button.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Third Pad`
option.description: Third Pad.The top right third pad button.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Fourth Pad`
option.description: Fourth Pad. The top right fourth pad button.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Fifth Pad`
option.description: Fifth Pad. The bottom left pad button.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Sixth Pad`
option.description: Sixth Pad.The bottom left second pad button.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Seventh Pad`
option.description: Seventh Pad. The bottom right third pad button.

option.label: :hwbtn:`Eighth Pad`
option.description: Eighth Pad.The bottom right fourth pad button.

option.label: Enable Braking (:hwbtn:`SHIFT` + :hwbtn:`PLAY`)
option.description: Enables separate PLAY start and PAUSE/STOP brake profiles using :hwbtn:`SHIFT` + :hwbtn:`PLAY`.

option.label: Brake Start Profile
option.description: Applied when pressing PLAY from stopped state. Off is instant, Classic is short, Slow is longer.

option.label: Brake Stop Profile
option.description: Applied when pressing PAUSE/STOP while playing. Off is instant, Classic is short, Slow is longer.

option.label: Reverse (:hwbtn:`PLAY`)
option.description: If enabled, PLAY and SHIFT+PLAY functions are reversed. Disabled by default.

option.label: 🎚️Split FX (:hwbtn:`Level/Depth`) → FX1 / (:hwbtn:`Level/Depth` + :hwbtn:`SHIFT`) → FX2
option.description: On: Level/Depth → FX1; :hwbtn:`SHIFT`+Level/Depth → FX2. Off: both FX units. Stem/Sampler+Level/Depth unchanged.

option.label: Auto Hide Sampler (:hwbtn:`SAMPLER` + :hwbtn:`LEVEL/DEPTH`)
option.description: Sampler Volume (All Decks): :hwbtn:`SAMPLER` + :hwbtn:`LEVEL/DEPTH` sets gain for active sampler pads (up to 16). Configurable sampler skin display when enabled.

option.label: Sampler Pad Layout🟥 🟧 🟨 🟦
option.description: Controls pad-to-sampler assignment and LED order for sampler mode: linear(Tango, Deere), row-banked(Late Night), or per-deck 32 (Deck1→1–8, Deck2→9–16, Deck3→17–24, Deck4→25–32). Note: per-deck 32 conflicts with ScratchBank’s 17–24 sample pool (Deck 3 overlap).

option.label: 🔍Enable Waveform Zoom (:hwbtn:`JOG SIDE PITCH-BEND`)
option.description: If enabled, jog side pitch-bend is replaced with waveform zoom on the selected deck mode (Vinyl or CDJ).

option.label: ‣ Waveform Zoom Mode
option.description: Choose which deck mode gets jog side pitch-bend → waveform zoom when enabled.

option.label: VU meter mode 🟢 🟡 🟠 🔴
option.description: Per deck: each meter follows `[ChannelN] vu_meter`. Main Output: left-column meters track `[Main] vu_meter_left` (or `[Master]` fallback); right-column meters track `[Main] vu_meter_right`. See Future/NOTES.md for optional future smart-auto ideas.

option.label: Mixxxed-Mode (See Manual📃)
option.description: When enabled, :hwbtn:`SHIFT` + FX beat buttons cycle per-deck modes on the Auto Loop pad row (Autoloop (1), Beat Slicer (2), Piano Roll (3), Scratch Bank (4)). Release :hwbtn:`SHIFT` or wait 1.5 s after the last step to lock. Mode preview uses the shift pad LED row.

option.label: ‣ 🔪 Beat Slicer pattern (Mixxxed-Mode Slot 2)
option.description: Pad layout while Beat Slicer (slot 2) is active. :hwbtn:`SHIFT` + Pad7 domain, Pad8 loop mode.

option.label: ‣ 🎹Piano Roll mode (Mixxxed-Mode Slot 3) ⚠️🔐

value.label: Play Through ▶️🎚 (pitch-shift only, no position snap)

option.description: Scale/layout used when Mixxxed-Mode slot 3 (Piano Roll) is active. Anchor modes use the highest-numbered set hotcue on deck 1 (updated when a new hotcue is set). :hwbtn:`SHIFT` + Auto Loop pad selects an existing hotcue as anchor; SHIFT row LEDs show which hotcues exist. Left Auto Loop row = decks 2/4, right = decks 1/3. Play Through is pitch-only (no anchor).

option.label: 🚫 Disable StartFader (channel + crossfader)
option.description: When enabled, disables StartFader behavior (SHIFT + slide channel fader / crossfader start). Use this if you do not want faders to start/stop decks.

option.label: Beat Tempo Ranges ⏰ (:hwbtn:`Deck Select` long-press)
option.description: Deck Select long-press cycles the tempo fader range.

control.description: SHIFT Button - press - Activates secondary functions
BROWSE - press - Toggle focus between sidebar and tracklist
BROWSE + SHIFT- press - Toggle focus between sidebar and tracklist backwards (optional SHIFT → maximize library)
BROWSE - rotate - Scroll up/down through tracks in library
BROWSE +SHIFT - rotate - Navigate horizontally between sections
LOAD (DECK1) - press - Load selected track to Deck 1
SORT (DECK1) - press - LOAD +SHIFT - Sort by configured library field
LOAD (DECK2) - press - Load selected track to Deck 2
SORT (DECK2) - press - LOAD +SHIFT - Sort by configured library field
LOAD (DECK3) - press - Load selected track to Deck 3
SORT (DECK3) - press - LOAD +SHIFT - Sort by configured library field
LOAD (DECK4) - press - Load selected track to Deck 4
SORT (DECK4) - press - LOAD +SHIFT - Sort by configured library field
PLAY/PAUSE (DECK1) - press - Play/Pause
CUE (DECK1) - press - Set/Call Cue, Back Cue
LOOP IN (DECK1) - press - Set Loop In point
LOOP OUT (DECK1) - press - Set Loop Out point
LOOP HALVE (DECK1) - press - Halve the current loop size
LOOP DOUBLE (DECK1) - press - Double the current loop size
AUTO LOOP (DECK1) - press - Toggle Loop On/Off
DECK+SHIFT (DECK1) - press - change CDJ/VINYL
JOG WHEEL PLATTER (DECK1) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) Scratching
Deck layer select (left side deck 1)
PLAY/PAUSE +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Apply brake/soft-start
CUE +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Jump to track start
RELOOP/EXIT +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Reloop and stop
BEAT SYNC (DECK1) - press - Beat Sync to Master deck
BEAT SYNC LONG PRESS (DECK1) - press - Set as Master deck
DECK SELECT LONG PRESS (DECK1) - press 1s+ - cycle tempo fader range
JOG WHEEL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK1) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) highspeed Pitch bend
SHIFT+ LEFT CUE - Toggle quantize on/off (Deck1)
CUE Channel +SHIFT - press - Single Tap - Quantize. Multi-tap - Adjust BPM to match tapped BPM
TEMPO (DECK1) - slide - Adjust track playback rate
JOG DIAL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK1) - rotate - Search (Fast Pitch bend)
JOG DIAL SIDE (DECK1) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode On (DECK1) - rotate - Scratch
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode Off (DECK1) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER Special Mode (DECK1) - rotate - Used for loop adjustment
PLAY/PAUSE (DECK2) - press - Play/Pause
CUE (DECK2) - press - Set/Call Cue, Back Cue
LOOP IN (DECK2) - press - Set Loop In point
LOOP OUT (DECK2) - press - Set Loop Out point
LOOP HALVE (DECK2) - press - Halve the current loop size
LOOP DOUBLE (DECK2) - press - Double the current loop size
AUTO LOOP (DECK2) - press - Toggle Loop On/Off
DECK+SHIFT (DECK2) - press - change CDJ/VINYL
JOG WHEEL PLATTER (DECK2) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) Scratching
Deck layer select (right side deck 2)
PLAY/PAUSE +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Apply brake/soft-start
CUE +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Jump to track start
RELOOP/EXIT +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Reloop and stop
BEAT SYNC (DECK2) - press - Beat Sync to Master deck
BEAT SYNC LONG PRESS (DECK2) - press - Set as Master deck
DECK SELECT LONG PRESS (DECK2) - press 1s+ - cycle tempo fader range
JOG WHEEL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK2) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) highspeed Pitch bend
SHIFT+ RIGHT CUE - Toggle quantize on/off (Deck2)
CUE Channel +SHIFT - press - Single Tap - Quantize. Multi-tap - Adjust BPM to match tapped BPM
TEMPO (DECK2) - slide - Adjust track playback rate
JOG DIAL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK2) - rotate - Search (Fast Pitch bend)
JOG DIAL SIDE (DECK2) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode On (DECK2) - rotate - Scratch
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode Off (DECK2) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER Special Mode (DECK2) - rotate - Used for loop adjustment
PLAY/PAUSE (DECK3) - press - Play/Pause
CUE (DECK3) - press - Set/Call Cue, Back Cue
LOOP IN (DECK3) - press - Set Loop In point
LOOP OUT (DECK3) - press - Set Loop Out point
LOOP HALVE (DECK3) - press - Halve the current loop size
LOOP DOUBLE (DECK3) - press - Double the current loop size
AUTO LOOP (DECK3) - press - Toggle Loop On/Off
DECK+SHIFT (DECK3) - press - change CDJ/VINYL
JOG WHEEL PLATTER (DECK3) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) Scratching
Deck layer select (left side deck 3)
PLAY/PAUSE +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Apply brake/soft-start
CUE +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Jump to track start
RELOOP/EXIT +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Reloop and stop
BEAT SYNC (DECK3) - press - Beat Sync to Master deck
BEAT SYNC LONG PRESS (DECK3) - press - Set as Master deck
DECK SELECT LONG PRESS (DECK3) - press 1s+ - cycle tempo fader range
JOG WHEEL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK3) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) highspeed Pitch bend
SHIFT+ CUE - Toggle quantize on/off (Deck3)
CUE Channel +SHIFT - press - Single Tap - Quantize. Multi-tap - Adjust BPM to match tapped BPM
Deck layer toggle (left)
TEMPO (DECK3) - slide - Adjust track playback rate
JOG DIAL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK3) - rotate - Search (Fast Pitch bend)
JOG DIAL SIDE (DECK3) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode On (DECK3) - rotate - Scratch
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode Off (DECK3) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER Special Mode (DECK3) - rotate - Used for loop adjustment
PLAY/PAUSE (DECK4) - press - Play/Pause
CUE (DECK4) - press - Set/Call Cue, Back Cue
LOOP IN (DECK4) - press - Set Loop In point
LOOP OUT (DECK4) - press - Set Loop Out point
LOOP HALVE (DECK4) - press - Halve the current loop size
LOOP DOUBLE (DECK4) - press - Double the current loop size
AUTO LOOP (DECK4) - press - Toggle Loop On/Off
DECK+SHIFT (DECK4) - press - change CDJ/VINYL
JOG WHEEL PLATTER (DECK4) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) Scratching
Deck layer select (right side deck 4)
PLAY/PAUSE +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Apply brake/soft-start
CUE +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Jump to track start
RELOOP/EXIT +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Reloop and stop
BEAT SYNC (DECK4) - press - Beat Sync to Master deck
BEAT SYNC LONG PRESS (DECK4) - press - Set as Master deck
DECK SELECT LONG PRESS (DECK4) - press 1s+ - cycle tempo fader range
JOG WHEEL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK4) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) highspeed Pitch bend
SHIFT+ CUE - Toggle quantize on/off (Deck4)
CUE Channel +SHIFT - press - Single Tap - Quantize. Multi-tap - Adjust BPM to match tapped BPM
Deck layer toggle (right)
TEMPO (DECK4) - slide - Adjust track playback rate
JOG DIAL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK4) - rotate - Search (Fast Pitch bend)
JOG DIAL SIDE (DECK4) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode On (DECK4) - rotate - Scratch
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode Off (DECK4) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER Special Mode (DECK4) - rotate - Used for loop adjustment
Show 4 Decks - EXTRA
Master Volume
Increase/Decrease FX_2 level/depth (all slots)
Increase/Decrease FX_1 level/depth (all slots)
MASTER VOLUME - rotate - Adjust master output volume
HEADPHONES LEVEL - rotate - Adjust headphone output volume
CROSSFADER - slide - Blend audio between left and right channels
MASTER VOLUME - rotate - Adjust master output volume
HEADPHONES LEVEL - rotate - Adjust headphone output volume
CROSSFADER - slide - Blend audio between left and right channels
SAMPLER GAIN(Volume) (DECK1) - press SAMPLER + rotate LVL/DEPTH
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK1) - SYNC message only for fader start
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK1) - CUE message only for fader start
CUE Channel - press - toggle Headphone Cue
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK1) - PLAY message only for fader start
TRIM (DECK1) - rotate - Adjust input gain
EQ HIGH (DECK1) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ MID (DECK1) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ LOW (DECK1) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
VOLUME FADER (DECK1) - slide - Adjust channel volume
TRIM (DECK1) - rotate - Adjust input gain
EQ HIGH (DECK1) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ MID (DECK1) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ LOW (DECK1) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
VOLUME FADER (DECK1) - slide - Adjust channel volume
SAMPLER GAIN(Volume) (DECK2) - press SAMPLER + rotate LVL/DEPTH
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK2) - SYNC message only for fader start
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK2) - CUE message only for fader start
CUE Channel - press - toggle Headphone Cue
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK2) - PLAY message only for fader start
TRIM (DECK2) - rotate - Adjust input gain
EQ HIGH (DECK2) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ MID (DECK2) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ LOW (DECK2) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
VOLUME FADER (DECK2) - slide - Adjust channel volume
TRIM (DECK2) - rotate - Adjust input gain
EQ HIGH (DECK2) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ MID (DECK2) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ LOW (DECK2) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
VOLUME FADER (DECK2) - slide - Adjust channel volume
SAMPLER GAIN(Volume) (DECK3) - press SAMPLER + rotate LVL/DEPTH
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK3) - SYNC message only for fader start
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK3) - CUE message only for fader start
CUE Channel - press - toggle Headphone Cue
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK3) - PLAY message only for fader start
TRIM (DECK3) - rotate - Adjust input gain
EQ HIGH (DECK3) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ MID (DECK3) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ LOW (DECK3) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
VOLUME FADER (DECK3) - slide - Adjust channel volume
TRIM (DECK3) - rotate - Adjust input gain
EQ HIGH (DECK3) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ MID (DECK3) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ LOW (DECK3) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
VOLUME FADER (DECK3) - slide - Adjust channel volume
SAMPLER GAIN(Volume) (DECK4) - press SAMPLER + rotate LVL/DEPTH
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK4) - SYNC message only for fader start
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK4) - CUE message only for fader start
CUE Channel - press - toggle Headphone Cue
SHIFT+CROSSFADER (DECK4) - PLAY message only for fader start
TRIM (DECK4) - rotate - Adjust input gain
EQ HIGH (DECK4) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ MID (DECK4) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ LOW (DECK4) - rotate (MSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
VOLUME FADER (DECK4) - slide - Adjust channel volume
TRIM (DECK4) - rotate - Adjust input gain
EQ HIGH (DECK4) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ MID (DECK4) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
EQ LOW (DECK4) - rotate (LSB) - script-routed: deck EQ
VOLUME FADER (DECK4) - slide - Adjust channel volume
FX UNIT - press - Toggle entire FX unit on/off
`Lock ON` — toggle Effect Unit 1 wet mix (left bus)
FX SLOT - press - Toggle effect on/off
FX SLOT - press - Toggle effect on/off
FX SLOT - press - Toggle effect on/off
FX UNIT - press - Toggle entire FX unit on/off
`Lock ON` — toggle Effect Unit 2 wet mix (right bus)
FX SLOT - press - Toggle effect on/off
FX SLOT - press - Toggle effect on/off
FX SLOT - press - Toggle effect on/off
SHIFT + FX2 (BEAT LEFT )- press (CHANNEL 1) - BPM nudge or Mixxxed-Mode (See Manual)
SHIFT + FX3 (BEAT RIGHT )- press (CHANNEL 1) - BPM nudge or Mixxxed-Mode (See Manual)
FX1 + SHIFT - press (CHANNEL 1) - Cycle to the next EffectChain
FX1 + SELECTOR - press (CHANNEL 1) - Cycle to the next Effect
FX2 + SELECTOR - press (CHANNEL 1) - Cycle to the next Effect
FX3 + SELECTOR - press (CHANNEL 1) - Cycle to the next Effect
FILTER (DECK1) - rotate - Filter Effect Knob
FILTER (DECK1) - rotate - Filter Effect Knob
SHIFT + FX2 (BEAT LEFT )- press (CHANNEL 2) - BPM nudge or Mixxxed-Mode (See Manual)
SHIFT + FX3 (BEAT RIGHT )- press (CHANNEL 2) - BPM nudge or Mixxxed-Mode (See Manual)
FX1 + SHIFT - press (CHANNEL 2) - Cycle to the next EffectChain
FX1 + SELECTOR - press (CHANNEL 2) - Cycle to the next Effect
FX2 + SELECTOR - press (CHANNEL 2) - Cycle to the next Effect
FX3 + SELECTOR - press (CHANNEL 2) - Cycle to the next Effect
FILTER (DECK2) - rotate - Filter Effect Knob
FILTER (DECK2) - rotate - Filter Effect Knob
FILTER (DECK3) - rotate - Filter Effect Knob
FILTER (DECK3) - rotate - Filter Effect Knob
FILTER (DECK4) - rotate - Filter Effect Knob
FILTER (DECK4) - rotate - Filter Effect Knob
HOT CUE 1 (DECK1) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 1
HOT CUE 2 (DECK1) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 2
HOT CUE 3 (DECK1) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 3
HOT CUE 4 (DECK1) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 4
HOT CUE 5 (DECK1) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 5
HOT CUE 6 (DECK1) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 6
HOT CUE 7 (DECK1) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 7
HOT CUE 8 (DECK1) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 8
HOT CUE 1 +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Clear Hot Cue 1
HOT CUE 2 +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Clear Hot Cue 2
HOT CUE 3 +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Clear Hot Cue 3
HOT CUE 4 +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Clear Hot Cue 4
HOT CUE 5 +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Clear Hot Cue 5
HOT CUE 6 +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Clear Hot Cue 6
HOT CUE 7 +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Clear Hot Cue 7
HOT CUE 8 +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Clear Hot Cue 8
HOT CUE 1 (DECK2) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 1
HOT CUE 2 (DECK2) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 2
HOT CUE 3 (DECK2) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 3
HOT CUE 4 (DECK2) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 4
HOT CUE 5 (DECK2) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 5
HOT CUE 6 (DECK2) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 6
HOT CUE 7 (DECK2) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 7
HOT CUE 8 (DECK2) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 8
HOT CUE 1 +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Clear Hot Cue 1
HOT CUE 2 +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Clear Hot Cue 2
HOT CUE 3 +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Clear Hot Cue 3
HOT CUE 4 +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Clear Hot Cue 4
HOT CUE 5 +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Clear Hot Cue 5
HOT CUE 6 +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Clear Hot Cue 6
HOT CUE 7 +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Clear Hot Cue 7
HOT CUE 8 +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Clear Hot Cue 8
HOT CUE 1 (DECK3) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 1
HOT CUE 2 (DECK3) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 2
HOT CUE 3 (DECK3) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 3
HOT CUE 4 (DECK3) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 4
HOT CUE 5 (DECK3) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 5
HOT CUE 6 (DECK3) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 6
HOT CUE 7 (DECK3) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 7
HOT CUE 8 (DECK3) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 8
HOT CUE 1 +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Clear Hot Cue 1
HOT CUE 2 +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Clear Hot Cue 2
HOT CUE 3 +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Clear Hot Cue 3
HOT CUE 4 +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Clear Hot Cue 4
HOT CUE 5 +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Clear Hot Cue 5
HOT CUE 6 +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Clear Hot Cue 6
HOT CUE 7 +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Clear Hot Cue 7
HOT CUE 8 +SHIFT (DECK3) - press - Clear Hot Cue 8
HOT CUE 1 (DECK4) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 1
HOT CUE 2 (DECK4) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 2
HOT CUE 3 (DECK4) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 3
HOT CUE 4 (DECK4) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 4
HOT CUE 5 (DECK4) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 5
HOT CUE 6 (DECK4) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 6
HOT CUE 7 (DECK4) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 7
HOT CUE 8 (DECK4) - press - Set/Jump to Hot Cue 8
HOT CUE 1 +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Clear Hot Cue 1
HOT CUE 2 +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Clear Hot Cue 2
HOT CUE 3 +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Clear Hot Cue 3
HOT CUE 4 +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Clear Hot Cue 4
HOT CUE 5 +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Clear Hot Cue 5
HOT CUE 6 +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Clear Hot Cue 6
HOT CUE 7 +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Clear Hot Cue 7
HOT CUE 8 +SHIFT (DECK4) - press - Clear Hot Cue 8
LOOP 1/4 (DECK1) - press - Toggle 1/4 beat loop
LOOP 1/2 (DECK1) - press - Toggle 1/2 beat loop
LOOP 1 (DECK1) - press - Toggle 1 beat loop
LOOP 2 (DECK1) - press - Toggle 2 beat loop
LOOP 4 (DECK1) - press - Toggle 4 beat loop
LOOP 8 (DECK1) - press - Toggle 8 beat loop
LOOP 16 (DECK1) - press - Toggle 16 beat loop
LOOP 32 (DECK1) - press - Toggle 32 beat loop
LOOP 1/4 (DECK1) +SHIFT — slicer / piano upper row
LOOP 1/2 (DECK1) +SHIFT — slicer / piano upper row

LOOP 32 (DECK1) +SHIFT — slicer / piano upper row

PAD 1 (LEFT) - press - Play Sample or Load Track (Deck 1)
PAD 2 (LEFT) - press - Play Sample or Load Track (Deck 1)
PAD 3 (LEFT) - press - Play Sample or Load Track (Deck 1)
PAD 4 (LEFT) - press - Play Sample or Load Track (Deck 1)
PAD 5 (LEFT) - press - Play Sample or Load Track (Deck 1)
PAD 6 (LEFT) - press - Play Sample or Load Track (Deck 1)
PAD 7 (LEFT) - press - Play Sample or Load Track (Deck 1)
PAD 8 (LEFT) - press - Play Sample or Load Track (Deck 1)
PAD 1 (LEFT)+SHIFT - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track (Deck 1)
PAD 2 (LEFT)+SHIFT - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track (Deck 1)
PAD 3 (LEFT)+SHIFT - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track (Deck 1)
PAD 4 (LEFT)+SHIFT - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track (Deck 1)

BEAT JUMP BACKWARD (DECK1) - press - Jump backward by current size
BEAT JUMP FORWARD (DECK1) - press - Jump forward by current size
BEAT JUMP SIZE DOWN (DECK1) - Halve the beatjump size
BEAT JUMP SIZE UP (DECK1) - Double the beatjump size
BEAT JUMP PAD 5 (DECK1) - press - Load previous track
BEAT JUMP PAD 6 (DECK1) - hold - Rewind while pressed
BEAT JUMP PAD 7 (DECK1) - hold - Fast-forward while pressed
BEAT JUMP PAD 8 (DECK1) - hold - Censor (reverseroll while pressed)
BEAT JUMP BACKWARD (DECK2) - press - Jump backward by current size
BEAT JUMP FORWARD (DECK2) - press - Jump forward by current size
BEAT JUMP SIZE DOWN (DECK2) - Halve the beatjump size
BEAT JUMP SIZE UP (DECK2) - Double the beatjump size
BEAT JUMP PAD 5 (DECK2) - press - Load previous track
BEAT JUMP PAD 6 (DECK2) - hold - Rewind while pressed
BEAT JUMP PAD 7 (DECK2) - hold - Fast-forward while pressed
BEAT JUMP PAD 8 (DECK2) - hold - Censor (reverseroll while pressed)
BEAT JUMP BACKWARD (DECK3) - press - Jump backward by current size
BEAT JUMP FORWARD (DECK3) - press - Jump forward by current size
BEAT JUMP SIZE DOWN (DECK3) - Halve the beatjump size
BEAT JUMP SIZE UP (DECK3) - Double the beatjump size
BEAT JUMP PAD 5 (DECK3) - press - Load previous track
BEAT JUMP PAD 6 (DECK3) - hold - Rewind while pressed
BEAT JUMP PAD 7 (DECK3) - hold - Fast-forward while pressed
BEAT JUMP PAD 8 (DECK3) - hold - Censor (reverseroll while pressed)
BEAT JUMP BACKWARD (DECK4) - press - Jump backward by current size
BEAT JUMP FORWARD (DECK4) - press - Jump forward by current size
BEAT JUMP SIZE DOWN (DECK4) - Halve the beatjump size
BEAT JUMP SIZE UP (DECK4) - Double the beatjump size
BEAT JUMP PAD 5 (DECK4) - press - Load previous track
BEAT JUMP PAD 6 (DECK4) - hold - Rewind while pressed
BEAT JUMP PAD 7 (DECK4) - hold - Fast-forward while pressed
BEAT JUMP PAD 8 (DECK4) - hold - Censor (reverseroll while pressed)

STEMS - PAD 1 (LEFT) - press - Mute Vocal (Deck 1)
STEMS - PAD 2 (LEFT) - press - Mute Synths (Deck 1)
STEMS - PAD 3 (LEFT) - press - Mute Bass (Deck 1)
STEMS - PAD 4 (LEFT) - press - Mute Drums (Deck 1)
STEMS - PAD 5 (LEFT) - press - Mute Effects (Deck 1)

STEMS - PAD 8 (LEFT) - press - Mute Effects (Deck 1)
AUTODJ (DECK1) - press +SHIFT - LEFT PAD AUTODJ PAD 1 - EXTRA
AUTODJ (DECK1) - press +SHIFT - RIGHT PAD AUTODJ NEXT PAD 2 - EXTRA
MIC O/F (DECK1) - press +SHIFT - LEFT PAD AUTODJ PAD 3 - EXTRA
Record (DECK1) - press +SHIFT - LEFT PAD AUTODJ PAD 4 - EXTRA
MATCH KEY (DECK1) - press +SHIFT - LEFT PAD - MATCH KEY - Key PAD 5 - EXTRA
ALIGN BEAT (DECK1) - press +SHIFT - LEFT PAD - ALIGN BEAT - Key PAD 6 - EXTRA
PITCH UP (DECK1) - press +SHIFT - LEFT PAD - PITCH UP - Key PAD 7 - EXTRA
PITCH DOWN (DECK1) - press +SHIFT - LEFT PAD - PITCH DOWN - Key PAD 8 - EXTRA
